src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/reque.general_idea: Add import for feign.Param annotation used in the class.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/reque.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Param

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/reque.general_idea: Rename field enable_syno_token to enableSynoToken and add @Param annotation to map to original query parameter name.
Rename field otp_code to otpCode and add @Param annotation to map to original query parameter name.
Rename field enable_device_token to enableDeviceToken and add @Param annotation to map to original query parameter name.
Rename field device_id to deviceId and add @Param annotation to map to original query parameter name.
Rename field device_name to deviceName and add @Param annotation to map to original query parameter name.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.0 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses Spring Framework 5, which is incompatible with Java 21 features and module system changes required for modern Spring Boot 3 applications.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to run on Java 21; compiling with source/target 17 would fail to utilize Java 21 features and may cause runtime issues if the application server or dependencies require Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade commons-io to 2.18.0 for compatibility and security.
Upgrade feign-jackson to 13.5 to align with Spring Cloud 2023.x and OpenFeign 13.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Feign 11.x is incompatible with Spring Cloud 2023.x (which uses OpenFeign 13.x); using mismatched versions causes classpath conflicts and runtime failures in Feign client initialization.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud BOM to 2023.0.6 to match Spring Boot 3.3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (Ilford) is designed for Spring Boot 2.7.x; it is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x (Luna), leading to dependency resolution failures and runtime class conflicts.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-cloud-openfeign to 4.1.4 to align with Spring Cloud 2023.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 3.1.2 is tied to Spring Cloud 2021.x; it is incompatible with the new Spring Cloud 2023.x BOM and Spring Boot 3, causing compilation or runtime errors due to API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-cloud-starter-contract-stub-runner to 4.1.4 to align with Spring Cloud 2023.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 3.1.2 is incompatible with Spring Cloud 2023.x and Spring Boot 3, leading to test execution failures due to API mismatches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade WireMock to 3.9.2 to support Java 21 and modern testing standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: WireMock 2.x has known compatibility issues with Java 21 (e.g., module access restrictions); WireMock 3.x is required for stable operation on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven version property to 3.9.0 to reflect modern build tooling.
Upgrade checkstyle to 10.21.0 for latest linting rules.
Upgrade spring-javaformat-checkstyle to 0.0.47 for compatibility.
Upgrade git-commit-maven plugin to 7.0.1.
Upgrade exec-maven plugin to 3.5.0.
Upgrade maven-checkstyle plugin to 3.5.0.
Upgrade maven-dependency plugin to 3.8.1.
Upgrade maven-jacoco plugin to 0.8.12.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.5.2 for Java 21 test execution support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Surefire 3.0.0-M5 may have issues running tests on Java 21 due to module system changes; 3.5.2 ensures stable test execution on the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade sonar-maven plugin to 4.0.0.4121.
Upgrade dependency-check-maven to 11.1.0.
Exclude bcprov-jdk15on from spring-cloud-starter-openfeign to avoid Bouncy Castle conflicts.
Explicitly add spring-webmvc dependency, likely to ensure correct version management or scope.
Update WireMock groupId from com.github.tomakehurst to org.wiremock to reflect the new official coordinates in version 3.x.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old groupId is deprecated/removed in WireMock 3.x; using it will result in dependency resolution failure (artifact not found).

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CircleCI Docker image from OpenJDK 11 to OpenJDK 17 to align with the project's Java version migration.
.circleci/config.yml.why_exists: The project has been upgraded to Java 21 (as per git log), so building with JDK 11 will fail due to incompatible bytecode versions or missing language features required by the new codebase.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Update the SonarCloud orb version to a newer release.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven distribution URL to version 3.9.11 to align with the project's build tool upgrade.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR URL to version 3.2.0 to ensure compatibility with the new Maven distribution.

lombok.config.general_idea: Added config.stopBubbling to prevent Lombok configuration from bubbling up to parent directories.

sonar-project.properties.general_idea: Update sonar.java.binaries to include test classes for better analysis coverage.
Update sonar.java.libraries to include test classes for better analysis coverage.
Add explicit sonar.java.test.binaries configuration for SonarQube.
Add explicit sonar.java.test.libraries configuration for SonarQube.
